response.overview: This documentary spends one year in the life of Portland's Karaoke From Hell band, the world's first live karaoke band and a staple of Old Town Portland. For over 30 years the band has entertained and allowed anyone to become the rock star of their dreams, if just for one night. This documentary offers a behind the scenes pass to the band, their process and their legacy in Portland's night life and culture.
response.title: Karaoke from Hell
